source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/05_HnX-P1, HnX-PB/92_인증 - FDA/Attachment/003_Circuit diagram 1_Inverter board assy.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Electrical schematic package for the X3 inverter board assembly, including connection overview, inverter, MCU, power, input, exposure, LCD, battery, lamp, and TOF connector circuits.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Design history or regulatory attachment documenting the circuit design and board interconnections for the inverter board assembly.
keyPoints: Document number DDPT006640 is shown with revision 00 and model X3 on the main inverter schematic sheets.
The schematic includes USB_PD, Hand Switch, FEEDBACK, BATT, LCD, LAMP, PWR1, PWR2, and TOF connections.
The inverter schematic includes charger, hot swap, full bridge, gate driver, MCU, filament, KV control, MA control, and power sections.
The MCU section references STM32H7A3VGT6 and connects to hand switch, LCD, charger, TOF, SMBUS, USB-to-UART, BT & WiFi, DAC, ADC, and exposure board signals.
Sub-schematics include INPUT BD SCH with document number DDPT006640_2 and EXPOSURE BD SCH with document number DDPT006640_1.

concepts.name: Inverter board assembly circuit diagram
concepts.evidence: sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/05_HnX-P1, HnX-PB/92_인증 - FDA/Attachment/003_Circuit diagram 1_Inverter board assy.pdf

evidence.claim: The main schematic package identifies model X3.
The main inverter schematic uses document number DDPT006640, revision 00.
Most main schematic sheets show date 2024-11-01.
One BT & WiFi schematic sheet shows date 2024-11-20.
The connection overview lists USB_PD, Hand Switch, FEEDBACK, BATT, LCD, LAMP, PWR1, PWR2, and TOF interfaces.
evidence.evidenceText: USB_PD Hand Switch FEEDBACK BATT LCD LAMP PWR1 PWR2 TOF

evidence.claim: The inverter schematic includes charger, KV control, fullbridge, gate driver, MCU, MA control, and filament blocks.
evidence.evidenceText: Charger BQ25756.SchDoc ... KV_Control.SchDoc ... Fullbridge.SchDoc ... GATE DRIVER.SchDoc ... MCU MCU.SchDoc ... MA_Control.SchDoc ... Fillament.SchDoc

evidence.claim: The input board schematic is document number DDPT006640_2, revision 00, dated 2024-11-01.
The exposure board schematic is document number DDPT006640_1, revision 00, dated 2024-11-01.
The battery connector section includes BATT(+), BATT(-), TS, SMBUS_SCL, SMBUS_SDA, and BATT_IN signals.
evidence.evidenceText: BATT(+) TS BATT(-) BATT(+) BATT(-) SMBUS_SCL SMBUS_SDA TS BATT_IN

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is indicated by source metadata and source path only; the schematic text itself does not state FDA or a regulatory authority.
Document dates are not fully consistent: most sheets show 2024-11-01, while sheet 23 shows 2024-11-20.
No standards are explicitly cited in the source text.
The source text appears to be OCR or schematic text extraction with repeated page coordinates and fragmented net labels.
